prompt: A static Astro blog with a cyberpunk terminal and tmux-session aesthetic. Generate cinematic but believable scenes with dark charcoal and near-black backgrounds, green phosphor glow, restrained cyan highlights, subtle amber indicator lights, practical monitors, compact home-lab hardware, Linux workstation energy, and real-world desk scale. Favor moody contrast, atmospheric depth, scanline-like light texture, and disciplined composition. Avoid fantasy armor, exaggerated sci-fi cityscapes, excessive magenta, floating holograms, or anything that feels like game splash art. Never include readable text, logos, watermarks, UI overlays, or terminal screenshots with legible words. quiet Linux writing desk, compact rack gear, multiple pane-like monitors, moody green phosphor glow, cinematic contrast, first-night launch energy
negative_prompt: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, deformed, low contrast, oversaturated magenta, fantasy armor, neon city skyline, floating holograms, extra limbs, duplicated screens, unreadable text, glitch collage, anime face, text, duplicate monitors
